title: SWE-I
description:
Role: Entry-level software engineer responsible for building, testing, and maintaining software features under guidance.

Key Responsibilities:
- Code: Write clean, well-documented code for features/bug fixes in assigned modules
- Test: Create unit tests, debug issues, and ensure code quality
- Collaborate: Work with senior engineers, PMs, and QA to understand requirements
- Learn: Ramp up on codebase, tools, and best practices; take feedback actively
- Ship: Deliver small-to-medium tasks on time within sprints

Requirements:
- Education: BS in CS/related field or equivalent experience
- Skills: Proficiency in 1+ language like Python/Java/C++, basic DSA, Git
- Must-have: Problem-solving skills, ability to learn quickly, good communication

Typical Scope: Owns individual tickets, not full systems. Usually 0-2 years experience.

title: Flutter Intern
description:
Role: Support the mobile dev team by building and testing UI features in Flutter apps under mentorship.

Key Responsibilities:
- Build UI: Convert designs into responsive screens using Flutter/Dart widgets
- Fix Bugs: Debug layout, performance, and functionality issues on Android/iOS
- Integrate APIs: Connect frontend to REST APIs using http/dio, handle state with Provider/Riverpod/Bloc
- Test: Write widget tests and test on multiple devices/emulators
- Collaborate: Attend standups, code reviews, and work with designers/backend devs

Requirements:
- Skills: Basic Dart, Flutter widgets, Git. Familiarity with state management is a plus
- Knowledge: Understanding of mobile app lifecycle, REST APIs, responsive design
- Soft Skills: Eager to learn, detail-oriented, able to take feedback

Typical Scope: 1-3 months, owns small UI features. Portfolio/GitHub with Flutter projects preferred.

title: Graphic Design Intern
description:
Role: Support the design team by creating visual assets for social media, web, and marketing under guidance.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design: Create graphics for posts, ads, presentations, and web using Figma/Photoshop/Illustrator
- Branding: Maintain brand consistency across all assets
- Iterate: Take feedback, revise designs quickly, and manage multiple small tasks
- Research: Look up trends, references, and assets for new campaigns
- Organize: Manage file versions and export assets in correct formats

Requirements:
- Skills: Basic proficiency in Figma, Photoshop, or Illustrator. Knowledge of typography, color theory, layout
- Portfolio: 3-5 design samples or student projects required
- Soft Skills: Creative, open to feedback, detail-oriented, meets deadlines

Typical Scope: 2-6 months, owns small assets and social content. Interns usually don’t lead full campaigns.

title: Fullstack Dev
description:
Role: Build and maintain both frontend and backend features for web applications end-to-end.

Key Responsibilities:
- Frontend: Develop responsive UIs with React/Vue/Angular, HTML, CSS, JS/TS
- Backend: Build APIs and business logic using http://Node.js/Python/Java/.NET, handle DB queries
- Database: Design schemas, write queries for SQL/NoSQL databases
- Integration: Connect services, third-party APIs, and manage auth/authz
- DevOps: Deploy apps, set up CI/CD, monitor logs and performance
- Debug: Troubleshoot issues across the full stack

Requirements:
- Skills: 1+ frontend framework, 1+ backend language, SQL basics, Git, REST APIs
- Nice to have: Docker, AWS/GCP, testing frameworks, system design basics
- Mindset: Can own features from DB to UI, comfortable switching context

Typical Scope: Owns features end-to-end. Mid-level roles usually 2-4 years experience.
